title: Impresario Entertainment is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Impresario Entertainment is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment:
Impresario Entertainment is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment!
